description: Validation rules for the P35 2024 joined input. All rules must pass before the joined input is certified.

field_rules.description: game_id must be present and non-null for every row.
game_date must be present and parseable as a date.
p_oof must be a calibrated probability in [0, 1].
p_market must be an implied probability in [0, 1].
generated_without_y_true must be True for every prediction row. Predictions inferred from y_true are FORBIDDEN.
license_ref must be populated for every odds row. Unlicensed odds are rejected.
source_odds_ref must identify the provenance of each odds row.
source_prediction_ref must identify the model/version used.

global_rules.description: production_ready must be False. The 2024 joined input is research-only.
Odds must NOT be reverse-engineered from game outcomes (y_true, scores, etc.).
Predictions (p_oof, p_model) must NOT be derived from final game scores or y_true labels.
Every game_id in prediction and odds templates must match the P32 game identity spine (mlb_2024_game_identity.csv).
Only 2024 MLB regular-season games are permitted.
